name: Spinach Lassagna
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (10 oz each) Frozen Spinach, thawed and drained well
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw the frozen spinach and drain any excess liquid.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine the thawed spinach, cottage cheese, egg substitute, and Italian seasoning. Stir until all ingredients are well blended.
3. Pour 1/2 cup of spaghetti sauce into the bottom of a 13x9x2 inch baking dish.
4. Layer 1/3 of the lasagna noodles, followed by the spinach mixture, and then more spaghetti sauce.
5. Repeat the layering process twice more.
6. Sprinkle shredded mozzarella cheese evenly over the top of the layers.
7. Sprinkle grated Parmesan cheese evenly over the top.
8. Cover the dish with foil or a lid.
9. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes.
10. Remove the cover and continue baking for an additional 25 minutes, until heated through and bubbly.
11. Remove from the oven and let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
